hero.name: Sanghyeon Shin
hero.title: Aspiring PM/PO
hero.subtitle: Dreaming of becoming a PM/PO who solves user problems through planning, design, and development

about.heading: About
about.description_1: I plan, build, and pitch. I’m a PM who grows by owning the entire journey — from the moment a problem is discovered to the moment it ships. From the first user interview to standing on an IR stage, I take responsibility for both ends.
about.description_2: HUFS Global Business & Technology × AI Convergence (GPA 4.14/4.5). I define problems with data, design in Figma, and ship in React. Hackathon wins and live deployments — built through practice, not theory.
about.description_3: The harder the problem, the more interesting it gets. Finding the best intersection between users, business, and technology is what I do best.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.description: Feel free to reach out for collaboration, projects, or opportunities.
